title: Mud settling experiments - Water/mud interface level time series
author: Brouwers, Bart
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Various mud settling experiments were conducted during this research
steps.instruction: Various mud settling experiments were conducted during this research. The variable between the different experiments is the procedure (technique and duration) for conditioning of the mud.  Four different techniques were applied. Durations varied from 15 to 60 minutes in steps of 15 minutes. During the experiments the level of the water/mud interface was monitored over a week. These datasets contain these time series of each settling experiment.
